title: rudbeckia laciniata var. heterophylla
intro: Rudbeckia laciniata var. heterophylla, also known as Green-Headed Coneflower, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rudbeckia laciniata var. heterophylla include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make medicinal remedies.
